message:
style(net): rustfmt formatting fixes across HTTP client, WebSocket, debounce, and trailing-bytes test

Apply rustfmt-consistent formatting to several modules that had minor
style drift:

- http_client.rs: Reformat authority_end find chain and empty-path
  conditional to standard rustfmt line-breaking style
- websocket/handshake.rs: Reformat parse_with_trailing let-binding
  with if-let chain to proper indentation
- websocket/server.rs: Break long from_upgraded() call and its function
  signature across multiple lines; reformat test call sites to match
- stream/debounce.rs: Remove unused AtomicU64 import (only Ordering
  is used)
- websocket_acceptor_trailing_bytes.rs: Normalize whitespace in
  trailing-bytes test, reformat import order, break long expect chains
  across lines

No behavioral changes — purely formatting and unused-import cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
